val_args.code:
import json, pandas as pd
perfect = pd.DataFrame(var_call_R7NonuSS0eysXz9l09mtBMzr)
with open(var_call_MX78MJqPIi6afVzQjPhSWpkt, 'r') as f:
    books = pd.DataFrame(json.load(f))
# filter to English via details containing 'English'
books_eng = books[books['details'].str.contains('English', case=False, na=False)]
# filter to Literature & Fiction in categories
books_lit = books_eng[books_eng['categories'].str.contains('"Literature & Fiction"', case=False, na=False)]
# fuzzy join on id suffix number
perfect['suffix'] = perfect['purchase_id'].str.extract('_(\d+)$')[0].astype(int)
books_lit['suffix'] = books_lit['book_id'].str.extract('_(\d+)$')[0].astype(int)
merged = pd.merge(perfect, books_lit, on='suffix')
result = merged[['book_id','title','categories','details','rating_number']].drop_duplicates().to_json(orient='records')
print("__RESULT__:")
print(result)
